main.description: A named folder for organizing publication subscriptions in The Social Wire.

sortOrder.description: Position of this folder in the sidebar. Lower values appear first.

icon.description: Emoji character or short icon name for this folder. If omitted, the UI renders a default folder icon.

iconImage.description: Optional URI for a custom image to use as the folder icon. Takes precedence over 'icon' if both are set.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this folder was created.
